name: Lantronix, Inc.
description: Lantronix, Inc. is a global leader in Edge AI and Industrial IoT solutions, providing intelligent computing, secure connectivity, and remote management for mission-critical applications. The company develops hardware and software solutions that enable businesses and government agencies to remotely access and manage network infrastructure equipment and rapidly network-enable their physical electronic devices. Headquartered in Irvine, California, Lantronix focuses on delivering innovative technologies that enhance operational efficiency and security across various industrial and enterprise environments, supporting the evolving needs of the Internet of Things ecosystem.
